description: A customer is disputing high charges after traveling internationally, claiming they were unaware of roaming fees.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve customer account and the specific billing statement with roaming charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and the bill in question.

nodes.task_description: Check the customer's plan details to confirm if it includes an international roaming package.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer's plan does not include free roaming.

nodes.task_description: Review account history for any pre-travel notifications sent regarding roaming charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a record of an SMS notification sent when the customer first connected abroad.

nodes.task_description: Explain the standard roaming rates and offer to retroactively add a one-week international pass to reduce the bill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the policy and successfully applies a travel pass to lower the customer's bill.
